feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: When single sign on to SAC, can I know the xml form of the samlresponse required to log in to SAC?
entry.content: When single sign on to SAC, can I know the xml form of the samlresponse required to log in to SAC?

entry.title: Mapping User Group to Roles Collection in BTP
entry.content:
Hii,

i have already assign user group to role collection but when i trying to login into Application then it saying Access Denied. how to resolve it?

entry.title: New Special GL Indicator
entry.content:
Dear Community/Experts,

In Our current project, we have some Employee Advances/ loans  Given to Employees/Staff members that need to be captured as Down payments to Employees in seperate GLs and many similar Advances for which they need to have a seperate Special GL indicator.

Would you please guide us on how can we achieve this Requirement

Thank you

entry.title: Product Cost Estimation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I run "material cost estimation" by using transaction code ck11n,
activity cost and activity IOH cost values not updating. Could please anyone help me. 

Regards,

Prabhakar

entry.title: [SAP DMC] - Call external service using POD View Extension with destination
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I need some guidance on a scenario where I have to call an external service using a POD View extension with a destination in BTP. Does anyone have an example or can guide me on how to do this?

Essentially, I need to call an endpoint in Cloud Integration. I attempted to follow the steps outlined in the Ajax Requests | SAP Help Portal, but I'm encountering difficulties.

Thanks

entry.title: Timeout for lost SAP 4hana internet connection
entry.content:
Hello !

We have a especific process that need to use data mobile for count material.

If exists any problems with wifi connection during process, we lost all operation realized.

Would we like to know if exists some setup in SAP 4Hana for increase this time out?

We already tried change some procedures like as rdisp/max_wprun_time and others in transaction RZ11, but not did effects.

 

Thanks so much.

entry.title: Re: How to use HANA Calculation View created in BW System...
entry.content: Ever since SAP migrated its community everything broke and now all the history of help is no longer available the link pointed above is broken. How can SAP miss such a critical thing ?

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Attachment Service Attribute handling
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I am trying to bind below parameters dynamically into the visible actions of attachment service. Somehow those parameters are not getting binded and whole string is getting passed as it 

Has anyone binded this dynamically anytime and is there something wrong in my code ?

 

thanks

entry.title: Missing key components during redefinition processs
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am trying to redefine the standard Odata service FDP_BD_STANDARD_CH_OP. During the process of redefinition I have noticed that the key fields are missing in the selection screen.

Here is one of the examples:

 

Why are the key fields not available during the redefinition process?

Best regards

entry.title: How to check the Disk usage of the PO Java system in the SAP NetWeaver Adminstrator interface
entry.content: As the title shows, I can see the usage of CPU and Memroy in the system summary of SAP NetWeaver Adminstrator, but I cannot see any information about Disk. If anyone knows, can you tell me? Thank you very much.

entry.title: Connection failed error into SAP Business One Mobile application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have followed all the configuration part but SAP B1 mobile application is not working.

We have done configuration into SAP and into integration framework like JDBC, B1DI. Also generate the certificate from the integration framework and deployed this certificate into mobile device but application is not working.

Facing error like "connection failed" while login into SAP B1 Mobile application 

SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: we cant do put away for alreday existing bin
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are facing issue,

while doing warehouse task creation & Put away process system pick empty bin instead of alreday existing bins. 

In this case, same material available with 2 different storage bins.

Thanks & Regards

  Shankar G

entry.title: How to accept request param inside a custom CDS service entity
entry.content:
entity description{
language : String;
shortDescription : String;
longDescription  : String;
deleted : Boolean default false;
Books   : Association to one Books;
}
 
entity Books : cuid ,managed {
     title : String;
     author : String;
     deleted : Boolean default false;
     to_description : Composition of many description
on to_description.books = $self;
}
 
BooksService.cds
 
service BookService{
 
  entity Book as projection on Books;
 
  entity BookList as 
select 
title,
author,
to_description.shortDescription as shortDescription
 
from Book 
where deleted = false; 
}
 
 
The current implementation of the BooksService.cds returns all descriptions associated with a book when the list service is invoked. However, the requirement is to modify the service to accept a parameter, Accept-Language, which specifies the preferred language for the description. Based on this language parameter, the service should filter and return only the description that matches the specified language.
 
To achieve this, the service needs to be updated to accept the Accept-Language parameter as a request parameter. Upon receiving the request, the service should extract the language preference from the Accept-Language header and use it to filter the descriptions associated with the books. Only the description that matches the specified language should be included in the response.
 
Please provide a solution that demonstrates how to modify the BooksService to accept the Accept-Language parameter and filter descriptions based on the specified language preference.

entry.title: Error after migration 2211 on methods that returns a String from OCC
entry.content:
We have this error after having migrated to version 2211, OCC methods that return a String when consumed return the following error:

JSONError: Unexpected token 'P' at 1:1Pre-pay Loads must be in POS placed by AR^

For example the following method:

@Secured({ "ROLE_CUSTOMERGROUP", "ROLE_CLIENT", "ROLE_TRUSTED_CLIENT"})
@GetMapping(value = "/{id}/notes")
@ResponseBody
@ApiBaseSiteIdParam
@Operation(operationId = "getNotes")
public String getNotes(@PathVariable @Parameter(description = "id", required = true) final String id){
    return myFacade.getNotes(id);
}

The method "myFacade.getNotes(id)" correctly returns a String:"Pre-pay Loads must be in POS placed by AR"

 

I also did the following test where I hardcode returning a string with extra quotes and it works perfectly:

Before the migration it worked correctly, it should be noted that the endpoints were moved from /rest to /occ although I consider that this should not be the problem.

I want to think it's a "lib" that is causing the problem but I'm not sure, does anyone have an idea of what could be happening?

Thanks for your help

entry.title: Not able to see my Badges after recent changes to community site
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, New community site changes looks great, many congratulations to team...

However, I am not able to see my earned badges, please help adding them back to my profile...

@craigcmehil @jerryjanda  please help

Thanks-

Abhishek

entry.title: Some community links are not working - pls help

Below sap community link is not working, please help

Understand the Differences Between SAP HANA On-Premise and SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database | SAP Tutorials

Thanks,

Abhigya

entry.title: SAP Learning Groups
entry.content:
I created a UDF field (Business Partner Master Data) at row level on the delivery note but when added the DN data is disappeared. Basically, I need to link business partner data at row level to obtain some additional data from the OCRD table on my delivery note layout. 

Looking for help on this

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Unable to see my blogs in one place?
entry.content:
How do I see my blogs

In the post section I see both but I want to see just my blogs and questions I posted separately?

The way it was before why do this keep changing?

In screenshot below 1st and 2nd are questions and 3rd blog how do I seperate?

 

 

Regards

Vinita

entry.title: Queue error for CIF article master data transfer
entry.content:
Hello,

I faced strange error in #EWM after trying to transfer Article Master Data by #CIF. Site and Customer are transferred correctly but when added an Article to the IM and activate it, process ended with the following message in EWM inbound queue

In the integration model there is only one article and one site - 1001. All landscape settings in customization seems to be fine. What else could be wrong?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error: Cannot create service instance, there isno database available in Business Application Studio.
entry.content:
Hi BTP Experts!!

When trying to create a new project from template in Business App Studio and after passing all the
default details as per the sap learning tutorial i can see that the new project is been created under explorer,under workspace.

screenshot below:

Now when i try to deploy the database artifact code (as mentioned in sap learning tutorial). It should first create a HDI container and then bound this code to create a physical table. But i am getting below error.

Error: Binding Service DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh failed : Service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh' not found: Service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh' failed to be created. Error: Service broker error: Service broker hana-broker failed with: Can not create service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh': There is no database available. Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization '6b16a23etrial'.

How can you assign a database for this dev space under Cloud Foundry (again i see this is deprecate) so it should be the HANA database instance that i created in HANA central (screenshot above).

But how can we assign this database to the dev space.

Can someone guide here

Thanks in Advance.
Mell
